title: ageratum myriadenium
intro: Ageratum myriadenium, also known as Eupatorium myriadenium, is a plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Ageratum myriadenium can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in some traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
